name: Disintegrate
description: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a target you can see within 60 feet. The target can be a creature, an object, or a creation of magical force, such as a wall of force. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 10d6 + 40 force damage and is disintegrated if this damage reduces it to 0 hit points. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, become a pile of fine gray dust; the creature can be restored only by true resurrection or wish. The spell automatically disintegrates a Large or smaller nonmagical object or magical force creation; a Huge or larger object or force creation loses a 10‑foot‑cube portion. Magic items are unaffected. When cast using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the damage increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.
